reviews.review_description: Really liked this game.  I’ve always liked Mahjong and this gives it a whole other dimension.  I would like to know if we can also be looking directly over it (top). Is there a trick to that?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your rating and review :) The only way now is moving the whole board up-down with the controller to get an upper viewpoint and you can use the zoom for shrinking - growing the board. Aim the controller to the side menu and press on the "zoom" with the controller trigger. After that aim to the board, press, and hold the trigger, and move the controller. The board will be changing the size.
I hope it is helps

reviews.review_description: I wish you could use the tracker on the remote instead of clicking "move" "rotate" and "zoom". That gets annoying when it's timed. And or have the game automatically pause when moving it around. Other than that it's classic mahjongg

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! 
You can use an alternative move/rotate. Aim to one tile, press the touch area on the remote and keep pressing during the moving/rotating :)
